description: The controversial life and unsolved death of Symon Petliura, one of Ukraine's most famous leaders A century ago, on May 25, 1926, an otherwise ordinary afternoon in Paris’ bohemian Latin Quarter was disrupted by a barrage of gunshots, leaving one of Ukraine’s famous military leaders dead in the street. Born in Poltava in 1879 to a family of Cossack descent, Symon Petliura would rise to command...

In order to shoot them down, faster interceptor drones are needed - aviation expert Kryvolap According to him, new jet drones will be able to fly faster and higher than ordinary "Shakhedov". At the same time, there is nothing "revolutionary" about them - the Russians simply continue to develop the "Geraney" line, betting on speed and new control systems: "If...
description_uk: русня запускает реактивные «Герани-4», которые разгоняются до 500 км/ч. Чтобы их сбить, нужны более быстрые дроны-перехватчики, — авиаэксперт Криволап По его словам, новые реактивные дроны смогут летать быстрее и выше обычных «Шахедов». При этом ничего «революционного» в них нет — россияне просто продолжают развивать линейку «Гераней», делая ставку на скорость и новые системы управления: «Если...

title: Today is the Day of the State Service of Special Communications and...

description: Today is the Day of the State Service of Special Communications and Information Protection of Ukraine. I thank you for the contribution to the protection of the sovereignty of Ukraine, for the stable communication, starting from the first days of the full-scale Russian invasion. He congratulated the servicemen of the State Special Forces on their professional holiday and honored them with state awards, as well as presented the epaulettes of a major general to the head of the SSSZI Oleksandr Potiy....

Я дякую за внесок у захист суверенітету України, за стабільний зв'язок, починаючи з перших днів повномасштабного російського вторгнення. The unit, formed by descendants of the 3rd separate assault brigade, performs tasks in the first echelon of air defense on the front line. The regiment covers the infantry and intercepts Russian drones flying to the rear cities of Ukraine. The "Aquila" unit was one of the first in the Ground Forces to use anti-aircraft...

title: Drone strike
title_en: Drone strike
description: In 5 months of this year, the Ministry of Defense contracted 5 times more drones of the middle-strike level than in the whole of 2025. Drones of the middle-strike level are an intermediate link between FPV drones and deep-strike for attacks deep into Russia. Unmanned aerial vehicles of this type are intended for hitting targets in the rear of the enemy at a distance of 30 to 200 km. Russian ammunition depots are located at such a distance,...
description_en: In 5 months of this year, the Ministry of Defense contracted 5 times more drones of the middle-strike level than in the whole of 2025. Drones of the middle-strike level are an intermediate link between FPV drones and deep-strike for attacks deep into Russia. Unmanned aerial vehicles of this type are intended for hitting targets in the rear of the enemy at a distance of 30 to 200 km. Russian ammunition depots are located at such a distance,...
description_uk: Минобороны за 5 месяцев этого года законтрактовало в 5 раз больше дронов уровня middle-strike, чем за весь 2025 год Дроны уровня middle-strike являются промежуточным звеном между FPV-дронами и deep-strike для атак вглубь россии. Беспилотники этого типа предназначены для ударов по целям в тылу врага на расстоянии от 30 до 200 км. На таком расстоянии расположены российские склады боеприпасов,...

title: A tired smile appears on the face when the finish line of the psycho...

title_uk: Втомлена усмішка з'являється на обличчі, коли фініш психо...
description: A tired smile appears on the face when the finish line of the psycho lane is behind and a tank is firing nearby. Because you did it. You overcame fatigue, overcame yourself. We harden not only the body, but also the character. After all, even the hardest day on the training ground cannot be compared with a day at the front. According to the materials of the 28th OMBr named after Knights of the Winter Campaign #подготовкаZSU
description_en: A tired smile appears on the face when the finish line of the psycho lane is behind and a tank is firing nearby. Because you did it. You overcame fatigue, overcame yourself. We harden not only the body, but also the character. After all, even the hardest day on the training ground cannot be compared with a day at the front. According to the materials of the 28th OMBr named after Knights of the Winter Campaign #подготовкаZSU
description_uk: Коли фініш психосмуги позаду і поруч стріляє танк — на обличчі зʼявляється втомлена посмішка. Бо ти це зробив. Ти поборов втому, поборов себе. Ми загартовуємо не лише тіло, а й характер. Адже навіть найважчий день на полігоні не порівняти з добою на фронті. За матеріалами 28 ОМБр ім. Лицарів Зимового Походу #підготовкаЗСУ

title: Attack attack on residential area
title_en: Attack attack on residential area
description: In the Shevchenkivskyi and Podilskyi districts of Kyiv, work continues to eliminate the consequences of yesterday's Russian strikes. Almost 100 employees of the State Emergency Service are involved in the work. In total, about 300 objects were damaged in Kyiv. Most of them are residential buildings - during the day yesterday, applications were received regarding various degrees of damage in almost 150 private and multi-story buildings. As of now...
description_en: In the Shevchenkivskyi and Podilskyi districts of Kyiv, work continues to eliminate the consequences of yesterday's Russian strikes. Almost 100 employees of the State Emergency Service are involved in the work. In total, about 300 objects were damaged in Kyiv. Most of them are residential buildings - during the day yesterday, applications were received regarding various degrees of damage in almost 150 private and multi-story buildings. As of now...
description_uk: У Шевченківському та Подільському районах Києва продовжуються роботи з ліквідації наслідків вчорашніх російських ударів. Майже 100 працівників ДСНС залучено до робіт. Загалом у Києві було пошкоджено близько 300 обʼєктів. Найбільше серед них житлових будинків – протягом дня вчора надійшли заявки щодо різних ступенів пошкодження у майже 150 приватних і багатоповерхових будинках. Станом на зараз...
